title: Crew user-level preferences
description: Optional per-user preferences at ~/.claude/crew/preferences.json (never committed to a repo). Two kinds of field. LIVE fields (models, personas, visualQA.tool) are resolved by the foreman at runtime on every run — profile pin > these preferences > plugin default — and are NOT written into a repo's .crew/profile.json. SEED fields (planDir, conventions, permissions) pre-fill the /crew:init interview and are copied into the committed profile as project facts. Every field is optional; a partial file is valid.

models.description: LIVE. Your standing per-role model tier, resolved at dispatch (profile pin > these > plugin default). Never persisted into a repo profile unless a project pins it. 'inherit' uses the session model. Scout and operative default to a cheaper tier (bounded/scoped work); surveyor, inspector, and the rest are judgment roles and stay strong.

personas.description: LIVE. Your preferred persona skin, applied by the foreman at dispatch for narration only. Resolved profile pin > these > plugin default; never persisted into a repo profile unless a project pins a skin. Copy a shipped preset's map (see presets.json) or set custom names.

visualQA.description: LIVE. Your standing visual-QA driver. Only `tool` is a preference (resolved profile pin > this > default `playwright`); `target`/`startCommand` are project facts, always set per-project at init. Set `none` if you don't run Playwright.

planDir.description: SEED. Preferred plan dir for new projects; copied into the committed profile at init.

conventions.description: SEED. Default conventions doc to look for, and/or standing notes to seed a new project's profile at init.

docRef.description: In-repo conventions doc init should look for first (e.g. AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md).

permissions.description: SEED. Extra permission entries init should append to a project's .claude/settings.json, on top of the plugin baseline.
